response.original_title: The Fable of Phineas P. Filewell
response.overview: A short cartoon produced by Filmbuilders Ltd. of Washington and presented by Universal CIT Credit Corporation, done in cooperation with the I.R.S., made as a public service short to encourage people to keep their tax records handy and do their Income Tax filing on time.
